globalNews.title: In Tehran, money is short and a return to war looms over daily life
globalNews.summary: The BBC's Lyse Doucet reports from Iran, where the buzz of busy shopping streets masks deep uncertainty over the country's future.

globalNews.summary: Opposition parties accused security forces but the official report does not say who was responsible.

globalNews.title: MrBeast's company sued by ex-employee over sexual harassment claim

cryptoNews.title: FTX estate misses out on $3B Cursor stake value after $200K sale in 2023
cryptoNews.summary: The FTX estate sold its Cursor stake for $200K in 2023, now worth $3B after a SpaceX-linked valuation surge, raising questions about bankruptcy asset sales.

cryptoNews.title: OKX accelerates US push with BitGo off-exchange settlement
cryptoNews.summary: OKX integrates BitGo off-exchange settlement for US institutions, reducing pre-funding requirements and marking a key step in its US expansion following ICE investment.

cryptoNews.title: Kelp DAO exploiter launders nearly all 75,700 in stolen ETH through THORchain
cryptoNews.summary: The wallet linked to the Kelp DAO exploit appears to have laundered most of the $175 million worth of stolen Ether, while another $71 million remains frozen by Arbitrum’s security council.

cryptoNews.title: Andre Cronje’s Flying Tulip adds withdrawal circuit breaker as DeFi exploits mount
cryptoNews.summary: Flying Tulip said its withdrawal safeguard is designed to fail open, while a status page lets users monitor the system in real time.

cryptoNews.title: BlackRock drives 7-day Bitcoin ETF inflow streak as BTC nears $80,000
cryptoNews.summary: US-listed spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded a seven-day inflow streak totaling $1.9 billion, surpassing their March run over a similar period.

aiNews.title: Another customer of troubled startup Delve suffered a big security incident
